decision_summary.rationale: The NAT Gateway has been idle for 14 days, processing only 7 KB/day on average, which is below the 1 MB/day idle threshold, and no active routes use this gateway, making destruction the optimal action.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The NAT Gateway nat-gw-staging-app has been identified as a ghost resource due to its prolonged period of inactivity. With an average daily processing of 7 KB, which is significantly below the idle threshold of 1 MB/day, and no active routes utilizing this gateway, it is safe to destroy the resource to avoid unnecessary costs. The associated EIP should also be released to prevent further waste.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers core facts well and is resource-specific, but misses the EIP allocation ID (eipalloc-0b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9), the $3.60/month idle EIP charge, and the lifecycle prevent_destroy=false requirement, while risk_assessment omits data_loss_acknowledged despite this being a destructive action.
